report.summary: Day 70 standup #13: Since v11, build-v11 added MiCA EU Regulation + DVT guides (5,400 words combined), design-v10 created 2 OG images + responsive/a11y fixes, community-v10 drafted Fed wipeout series + newsletter v6. EOD-v11 confirms 674 uncommitted files (+4), 444 slugs (+4), 1,108 page.tsx (+2). Git locks now 8+ days (P0). 61 agent runs today ($5,191). ZERO deployed. Recommend standup-only mode.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v11: Full rotation completed — build-v11, design-v10, community-v10, eod-v11 all ran. Zero commits, zero deploys. Git locks 8+ days.

BUILD-V11 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — MiCA EU Crypto Regulation Guide 2026 (~2,800 words, CASP deadline July 2026, USDT delisting impact, 14 authorized exchanges, 6 FAQs) and Distributed Validator Technology (DVT) Guide (~2,600 words, SSV 1.1M+ ETH, Obol 258K ETH, Vitalik native DVT proposal, Obol vs SSV comparison). Both added to PUBLISHED_PAGES batch 10.

DESIGN-V10 OUTPUT: 2 new OG images (MiCA EU shield + timeline, DVT node mesh + key splitting). Responsive typography clamp() on both pages. Mobile table scroll wrappers. Touch targets enlarged to WCAG 2.1 (36px min). focus-visible outlines for keyboard nav. Fixed 'use client' metadata conflict on MiCA page.

COMMUNITY-V10 OUTPUT: 4 new tweets (Fed $100B wipeout, 422-page milestone, DCA fear edition, CLARITY Act complication). Discord/TG Monday update. Newsletter v6 weekly digest draft. Fed Wipeout social card (1200x630 SVG). Content calendar v7 fills Mon-Tue.

EOD-V11 FINDING: 674 uncommitted files (+4 since v10). 444 published slugs (+4). 341/444 have dedicated page.tsx (+2). 1,108 total page.tsx (+2). 42 TS errors unchanged. Git locks 7.3 days. Rate limiter still 0/6 core routes.

MARKET UPDATE: BTC ~$68K (volatile, $100B 24h wipeout). ETH ~$2,057 (-5-6%). F&G 10 (Extreme Fear, Day 47+). Fed held rates 3.5-3.75%. Whale accumulation 270K BTC (13-yr high). Exchange supply 2.7M BTC (6-yr low). CLARITY Act complication (community bank deregulation attached).

SEO RISK: 8+ days without deploy. ~129+ built pages not live in production. 4 new high-value guides (MiCA, DVT, Flash Loans, DeFi Vaults) trapped behind git locks. Extreme Fear market = peak organic search window being missed.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v11: Build-v11 (MiCA + DVT guides), design-v10 (2 OG images + responsive/a11y fixes), community-v10 (Fed wipeout series + newsletter v6), eod-v11 (QA cycle). 4 agents + this standup = 5 runs, $442 human-equivalent.

TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 22+ learn guides built, 15 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES, 16+ OG images, 38+ social posts + 15 SVG cards, 11 QA cycles, 10 design audits, 61 agent runs across ~10.2 rotations. ZERO deployed to production.
BLOCKER [P0 — 8+ DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. Blocks ALL commits and deploys. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock — requires Jefe's manual intervention.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 42 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts + 2 in crypto-index-funds page (masked by ignoreBuildErrors).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs without page.tsx, 5 pages missing OG images.
PUBLISH_QUEUE EMPTY: No more pages to promote. Build cycles generating content with no deploy path.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY: 8+ days blocked. 674 uncommitted files at risk. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add → commit → push → verify Vercel auto-deploy. This is the ONLY priority that unblocks value.

PRIORITY 2 — HALT ALL BUILD AND DESIGN CYCLES: 444 slugs declared, ~315 in production. Publish queue empty. Content pipeline has outrun shipping by 129+ pages. Building more guides = pure waste until deploy gap is closed.

PRIORITY 3 — STANDUP-ONLY MODE UNTIL DEPLOY: Recommend running ONLY standup agent. All other agents burn $452/rotation with zero path to production. Today: $5,191 human-equivalent with nothing reaching users. Market conditions (Extreme Fear Day 47+ / Fed $100B wipeout / whale accumulation) make this a high-traffic moment being missed.

STRATEGIC NOTE: 61 agent runs today ($5,191 human-equivalent) with zero reaching production. 4 premium guides (MiCA, DVT, Flash Loans, DeFi Vaults) are high-value SEO assets stuck behind a single-command fix. Fed panic + CLARITY Act uncertainty = peak organic search window for regulation and DeFi education content.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $5,191 (61 runs: standup×12 $540, build×11 $2,563, publish×7 $385, design×10 $600, community×10 $410, eod×11 $693)
